name: harness
description: Multi-agent sprint orchestration harness for long-running application development.

interface.longDescription: Runs an Anthropic-style application harness with initializer, planner, generator, evaluator, coordinator, tester, reviewer, releaser, and architect roles. Explicit sprint strategy, quantified QA, and a completion ledger. Supports agile, waterfall, scrum, and kanban methodologies.
defaultPrompt: Build an app using the harness.
Review whether this harness really followed the sprint plan.
Run continuous multi-agent app delivery until done.
